moments.title: World Cup 2026 Final Reaction
moments.blurb: Spain beat Argentina 1-0 in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final on Sunday, July 19th, in a thrilling conclusion to the tournament.

angles.name: Final Score Buzz
angles.copy: Still buzzing from the World Cup Final on Sunday? Spain lifted the trophy after a tense 1-0 victory over Argentina. What was your highlight?

angles.name: Tournament Wrap
angles.copy: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is done! From the group stages to Spain's ultimate triumph, it was a tournament of incredible moments. Who impressed you most?

moments.title: The Open Championship Recap
moments.blurb: Ryan Fox claimed his first major title at The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale, which concluded on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Golf Major Winner
angles.copy: Huge congratulations to Ryan Fox, Champion Golfer of the Year! His victory at Royal Birkdale on Sunday was a fantastic display of skill.

angles.name: Birkdale Brilliance
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale delivered another classic Open Championship. What a weekend of golf, capped by Ryan Fox's memorable win!

moments.title: Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) 78th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary folk-rock singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, turns 78 today.

angles.name: Wild World of Cat Stevens
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to the iconic Cat Stevens, aka Yusuf Islam! From 'Wild World' to 'Father and Son', his music is timeless.

angles.name: Folk Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible songwriting and voice of Cat Stevens on his 78th birthday. What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Paloma Faith 45th Birthday
moments.blurb: British singer and actress Paloma Faith celebrates her 45th birthday today.

angles.name: Only Love Can Hurt Like This
angles.copy: Happy 45th Birthday to the fabulous Paloma Faith! Her unique style and powerful vocals always hit different. What's your favourite song?

angles.name: British Soul Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to the incredible Paloma Faith! A true British talent.

moments.title: Don Henley 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Don Henley, drummer and co-lead vocalist of The Eagles, turns 79 tomorrow, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Getting ready to celebrate Don Henley's 79th birthday tomorrow! The voice behind so many Eagles classics. Which one's on your playlist?

angles.name: Hotel California Drummer
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we raise a glass to Don Henley of The Eagles on his 79th! A true rock icon.

moments.title: George Clinton 85th Birthday
moments.blurb: Funk music pioneer George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, celebrates his 85th birthday tomorrow, July 22nd.

angles.name: Funk Master
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the Godfather of Funk, George Clinton, turns 85! Get ready to get down with Parliament-Funkadelic.

angles.name: P-Funk Power
angles.copy: Happy almost-birthday to the legend, George Clinton! 85 years of pure funk. What's your favourite P-Funk track?

moments.title: Selena Gomez 34th Birthday
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Selena Gomez will be celebrating her 34th birthday tomorrow, July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the incredible Selena Gomez turns 34! Get ready to celebrate a decade-plus of hits.

angles.name: Birthday Wishes
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 34th Birthday to Selena Gomez for tomorrow! What's your favourite Selena era?

moments.title: Slash 61st Birthday
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses legendary guitarist Slash, born Saul Hudson, turns 61 on Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Thursday marks the 61st birthday of the one and only Slash! That top hat and those riffs are unmistakable. What's your favourite GNR solo?

angles.name: Sweet Child O' Mine
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to rock icon Slash on Thursday! Still shredding after all these years.

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez 57th Birthday
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on Friday, July 24th.

angles.name: Jenny From The Block
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate J.Lo's 57th birthday on Friday! The ultimate triple threat. What's your go-to Jennifer Lopez dance track?

angles.name: Birthday Diva
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only Jennifer Lopez this Friday! Still bringing the heat.

moments.title: Mick Jagger 83rd Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, turns 83 on Monday, July 26th.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Still got the moves like Jagger! The iconic Mick Jagger turns 83 on Monday. What's your favourite Stones anthem?

angles.name: Stones Forever
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger this Monday! A true living legend of rock and roll.

moments.title: Roger Taylor 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Queen drummer Roger Taylor celebrates his 77th birthday on Monday, July 26th.

angles.name: Queen Drummer
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 77th Birthday to Queen's legendary drummer, Roger Taylor, this Monday! Those drum fills are iconic.

angles.name: Radio Ga Ga
angles.copy: Celebrating Roger Taylor's 77th on Monday! The powerhouse behind Queen's rhythm. What's your favourite Queen track featuring his drums?

moments.title: Geddy Lee 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Rush frontman and bassist Geddy Lee turns 73 on Thursday, July 29th.

angles.name: Rush Legend
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the incredible Geddy Lee of Rush on Thursday! A true titan of progressive rock.

angles.name: Prog Rock Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Geddy Lee's 73rd this Thursday! His distinctive voice and basslines shaped a generation of rock. What's your favourite Rush track?

moments.title: Kate Bush 68th Birthday
moments.blurb: Iconic British singer-songwriter Kate Bush celebrates her 68th birthday on Friday, July 30th.

angles.name: Running Up That Hill
angles.copy: On Friday, we celebrate the 68th birthday of the enigmatic and brilliant Kate Bush! Her music is truly one-of-a-kind.

angles.name: Art Pop Queen
angles.copy: Happy 68th Birthday to the legendary Kate Bush this Friday! From 'Wuthering Heights' to 'Running Up That Hill', her artistry is unmatched.

moments.title: Fatboy Slim 63rd Birthday
moments.blurb: British DJ and producer Fatboy Slim, real name Norman Cook, turns 63 on Saturday, July 31st.

angles.name: Right Here, Right Now
angles.copy: Big Beat legend Fatboy Slim turns 63 on Saturday! Get ready to praise him like he should. What's your favourite track to drop?

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: Wishing a huge Happy 63rd Birthday to Fatboy Slim this Saturday! Bringing those festival vibes since the 90s.

moments.title: Will Champion 48th Birthday
moments.blurb: Coldplay drummer Will Champion celebrates his 48th birthday on Saturday, July 31st.

angles.name: Coldplay Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 48th Birthday to Coldplay's Will Champion on Saturday! The steady beat behind so many anthems.

angles.name: Yellow Drummer
angles.copy: Celebrating Will Champion's 48th this Saturday! What's your favourite Coldplay song to drum along to?

moments.title: Summer Holiday Season in Full Swing
moments.blurb: With schools out and the weather warming up, the UK is fully immersed in the summer holiday period.

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Whether you're staying local or heading off, what are your summer holiday plans this week?

angles.name: Heatwave Hopefuls
angles.copy: Who's making the most of the summer weather? Perfect for picnics, beach trips, or just chilling in the garden!

moments.title: Official Singles Chart Update Friday
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart will refresh this Friday, July 24th, with a new Number 1 potentially on the cards.

angles.name: New Chart Friday
angles.copy: Who's going to be Number 1 this week? The Official Singles Chart updates on Friday – predictions, please!

angles.name: Chart Battle
angles.copy: The race for Number 1 heats up! We'll know the new Official Singles Chart topper this Friday. Any dark horses for the top spot?
